creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Update to 0.6.17.

Add vendor patch to fix blank page erro on PHP 5.4. Patch come from
here:

http://pnp4nagios.git.sourceforge.net/git/gitweb.cgi?p=pnp4nagios/pnp4nagios;a=blobdiff;f=lib/kohana/system/core/Kohana.php;h=c79e30bc55cf8521e59fb985312d5a3c6a321cda;hp=19bd658aa7543a7b833eafa44fe7bf171d33baf1;hb=66c997752c7ca2e37029322df861acc8ecebeadf;hpb=0c349ea1164790c1472a67c89b134dd18f372a63

A few notes:

I reworked the patches because I was unable to regenerate them from
git as they were, so I made them conform to the standard naming and
grouping. Hope this is not too much of an annoyance to you!

I added patches to manage configuration files as recommended in
the porter's handbook.
